full_text:
FINPROVE gynecological cancers

FINPROVE gynecological cancers

Project overview

Project overview

Nanostring panel & tCycIF imaging on patients with advanced gynecological malignancies in the FINPROVE clinical trial. Special focus on patients treated with MEK inhibitors & LGSC patients. Our aim is to discover correlations between transcriptional signatures, spatial protein expression and treatment responses.

Nanostring panel & tCycIF imaging on patients with advanced gynecological malignancies in the FINPROVE clinical trial. Special focus on patients treated with MEK inhibitors & LGSC patients. Our aim is to discover correlations between transcriptional signatures, spatial protein expression and treatment responses.
